title: Ho Chi Minh City、Ho Chi Minh City — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Ho Chi Minh City、Ho Chi Minh Cityの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Ho Chi Minh CityはHo Chi Minh Cityにある人口9,320,000の都市です。Vietnam’s largest city and economic engine, formerly Saigon, offering a dynamic mix of modern skyscrapers, French colonial architecture, and one of Southeast Asia’s most vibrant food scenes.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
